description: Validate an nf-core/rnaseq-style samplesheet (sample,fastq_1,fastq_2,strandedness) and, optionally, design metadata. Catches missing/duplicate FASTQs, mixed paired/single-end rows, invalid strandedness, too few replicates, and batch fully confounded with condition. Read-only.
rules: read-only — only reads the samplesheet/metadata; writes a report under record_store
exit nonzero on any ERROR is captured by the porter; the report and audit line are always written
local FASTQ existence is checked unless --no-check-files semantics are desired (remote URLs are warned, not errored)
needs only python3 + pandas — no aligner or science container required
usage: Set SAMPLESHEET (CSV with at least 'sample','fastq_1'). Optionally set METADATA (design CSV indexed by sample), CONDITION_COL (default 'condition'), MIN_REPLICATES (default 3). Output: validation_report.txt.
limitation: Validates structure and design sanity only; it does not run QC, alignment, or quantification. Replication/confounding checks require METADATA.
